# Ahmad Jafarov

Frontend Developer specializing in React, Next.js, and React Native. Building web and mobile apps from Baku, Azerbaijan.

> Frontend Developer at Ferrum Capital building enterprise B2B platform (2,000+ partners), CRM systems (50+ employees), and mobile apps (150K+ users). Open to remote work and global opportunities.

## About

- **URL**: `/`
- **Description**: Personal introduction with 5+ years experience, current role, and approach to building accessible, usable products.

## Experience

- **URL**: `/experience`
- **Description**: Work history - Frontend Developer at Ferrum Capital (Aug 2023 - Present) and Software Developer at InnoSight LLC (Mar 2024 - Apr 2025).

- **URL**: `/projects`
- **Description**: Portfolio including Ferrum Capital Mobile (150K+ users), 4YOU mental health platform (30+ psychologists, 400+ customers), and CodeMark interactive notebook.
